synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-23324 Oracle Linux 9 freeradius bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23324
description:
[3.0.27-3]
- Bump release number
  Resolves: RHEL-128083

[3.0.27-2]
- Reintroduce "Ignore home server ping packets"
  Resolves: RHEL-128083
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23324

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23324.html

[3.0.27-3]
- Bump release number
  Resolves: RHEL-128083

[3.0.27-2]
- Reintroduce "Ignore home server ping packets"
  Resolves: RHEL-128083
